final_prompt.prompt:
Create a social media avatar/profile picture for a content creator focused on new energy vehicles, digital tech products, and lifestyle goods (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "universally accessible, cross-cultural" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Swiss International Style (neutral, geometric clarity), MUJI brand identity (minimal, warm neutrality), contemporary tech startup branding (Apple/Google design heritage); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: centered, balanced framing suitable for circular crop (avatar format)
Subject: must include abstract/geometric visual elements suggesting mobility/tech/lifestyle without specific cultural symbols
Scene/backdrop: clean, neutral background — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, approachable atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a neutral, globally harmonious direction avoiding region-specific color taboos — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean, modern surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must avoid culturally specific symbols, religious iconography, hand gestures, or color combinations that could offend in any major cultural region; must work harmoniously when cropped to circular avatar format
Avoid: must avoid specific cultural/religious symbols, national flags, hand gestures with regional meanings, color combinations with negative associations in any major culture, text-heavy designs that don't scale to small sizes
